ui.rate_limited: Rate limited — waiting for quota to reset

region_warning.wildfires_us_only: Wildfire data is US-only. Your Home Assistant location is outside the US — no fires will show.
region_warning.noaa_us_only: NOAA radar is US-only. Your Home Assistant location is outside the US — radar may not load.
region_warning.combined: {features} are US-only. Your Home Assistant location is outside the US — these will not load.
region_warning.alerts_us_only: NWS watches & warnings are US-only. Your Home Assistant location is outside the US — alerts will not load.
region_warning.dwd_de_only: DWD radar covers Germany and its immediate neighbours. Your Home Assistant location is outside this region — the map may show only no-data.

wildfire.disclaimer: Informational only — not a substitute for official alerts.

alerts.disclaimer: INFORMATIONAL ONLY — not for life-safety decisions.

time_range.helper_static: Static frame — no animation, refreshes every 5 min

display.square_map_disabled_helper: Disabled when a height is set or the card is in a sections-grid cell with a fixed row count — those constraints already pin the card's height.
display.alerts_min_severity_helper: Hide alerts below this severity level

interaction.disable_scroll: Disable Scroll (allow page swipe through map)

animation.transition_time_helper: Default: 40% of frame delay — max: frame delay
animation.smooth_overlap_helper: Smooth-mode only. 0 = sequential (no brightness dip, cushion held). 1 = simultaneous (brief mid-transition dip). Default: 1
animation.playback_speed_helper: Multiplier applied to frame delay. The toolbar speed button can also change this at runtime; that runtime choice is remembered per browser and overrides this default.
animation.viewer_layer_control_helper: When enabled, the toolbar speed button persists per user and follows them across browsers and devices via Home Assistant frontend storage. When off the button still works for the current session but the choice is not saved.
animation.motion_compensation_helper: Slides each frame in the direction of rain motion during the crossfade so the rain appears to drift smoothly between frames instead of teleporting to its new position. Motion is recovered from the frame pair via pyramidal Lucas-Kanade optical flow — no external wind data, works for all radar sources. Pairs naturally with Smooth Animation. Default off.

appearance.radar_opacity_helper: 1.0 = fully opaque (default), lower = more transparent over the basemap

overlays.wildfires_description: Active US wildfire perimeters from NIFC's WFIGS feed.
overlays.alerts_description: Active US National Weather Service watches and warnings.
overlays.wildfire_radius_km_helper: Only show fires within N km of map centre
overlays.alerts_radius_km_helper: Only show alerts within N km of map centre
overlays.alerts_categories_label: Alert categories — toggle which event types render
overlays.lightning_description: Live lightning strikes from the Blitzortung integration. Strikes appear as a brief flash, then a coloured + sign that ages through white → yellow → orange → red.
overlays.lightning_integration_required: Requires the Blitzortung integration — install it in Home Assistant first.
overlays.lightning_max_age_minutes_helper: Card-side cap. Default 30. Does not change the Blitzortung integration’s own max-age setting.

wind.description: 10m wind sampled from a forecast model. Pick a data source, a static style, and/or animated streamlines.
wind.cadence_note: Source: DWD ICON-D2 forecast (global 0.25°). Updates at the top of each hour; new model runs every 3 h.
wind.source_helper: ICON-D2 covers the globe at 0.25°. NDFD covers the US at 2.5 km.
wind.cadence_dwd_icon: DWD ICON-D2 numerical model. 0.25° global grid (~28 km). Hourly anchor, +48 h forecast, new model run every 3 h.
wind.cadence_dwd_aicon: DWD AICON — ICON-D2 with AI-augmented post-processing. Same 0.25° global grid (~28 km) and hourly cadence as ICON-D2; reportedly improves short-range accuracy.
wind.cadence_ndfd_wind: NWS NDFD forecaster blend (HRRR + RAP + NAM + GFS). 2.5 km CONUS / AK / HI / PR. Hourly updates, 3-hourly forecast steps out to 7+ days. Outside US coverage the card auto-switches to AICON so you still see global wind.
